creator: dougb@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed


Your port has been committed, thanks. 

Some notes: 
1. Please install devel/portlint and use at least the 
-abctN flags when submitting a new port. Leave off 
-N for updates. 
2. You don't need PORTREVISION for a new port, that's only 
for updates that add functionality to a port between 
port version updates. 

In any case, thanks for your hard work. :)
